message:
test(core): property-based tests for connection pool invariants (wa-rpyw)

15 proptest properties verifying PoolConfig/PoolStats serde roundtrips,
PoolError equality, idle_count bounded by max_size, FIFO ordering,
excess puts dropped, clear() empties, stats consistency after
acquire/put cycles, try_acquire on full pool, into_parts lifecycle,
and empty pool acquire semantics.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
